name: Burdock Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the cardoon thoroughly. Cut into 2-inch pieces.
2. Boil the cardoon until tender, then drain well.
3. Heat olive oil in a frying pan. Add 1 clove garlic and sauté for a few minutes, removing the garlic afterward.
4. Add the cardoon to the pan and sauté about 10 minutes.
5. Mix the eggs, parsley, and cheese.
6. Pour the mixture over the cardoon.
7. Cook as an omelet in the frying pan, then flip using a round dinner plate to brown on the other side.
8. Cut into wedges. Serve with crusty Italian bread.
